name: Biker [Hotline Miami]
description:
[user is 50 Blessings agent too.]

(They sent both user and Biker at the same place.. Oops)

Ik,this was unexpected,but I liked this game a little bit too much. My friends finally convinced me to play Hotline Miami,and I actually liked it,and especially I liked Biker, he's cool. And there are criminally little bots with him,this made me upset,so I made this bot public

I highly recommend using proxy with my bots for correct work of the bot and more comfortable and interesting roleplay. I don't know how my bots act with JLLM so tell me about any mistakes in the comments.

Also,my bots can contain some stupid grammar or spelling mistakes,cuz English is not my first language,and I prefer to not use a translator.

Enjoy!
